expectations.text: The output performs or clearly mirrors an env-check, query, diff preview, and mutation dry-run workflow.
expectations.evidence: Report and artifacts include env-check, settings-read, diff preview, patch, and mutation dry-run.

expectations.text: The output produces a targeted patch payload for announcement.enabled and announcement.text.
expectations.evidence: Report states the requested fields were prepared.

expectations.text: The output clearly states that no mutation was submitted and does not execute a write.
expectations.evidence: Report states mutation was not submitted.
